title: Specially optimized
description: More specially optimized minecraft than Fabulously optimized
body:
# Specially optimized
Specially optimized is a modpack that makes minecraft run much better with mods like Sodium, lithium, iris shaders and entity culling. It also has more special mods like noisium, ferriteCore and modernfix. It makes your game run almost 5x the normal frame rate and makes everything much more optimized.



# [Do you want a server?](https://bisecthosting.com/jalnyr)
